title: Borrowed Night
theme: Teen Sleep Loss and Screen Time
dataset_topic: Adolescent sleep duration and digital screen exposure
insight: Teenagers are losing sleep not because the night got shorter, but because screens are taking its place.
visual_metaphor: A teenager in bed is covered by a glowing smartphone screen instead of a blanket.
image_prompt: A cinematic editorial photograph, top-down composition, of a teenager lying in bed at night, covered with a giant glowing smartphone screen instead of a blanket. The screen emits cold blue light over the pillow, sheets, and walls, replacing warmth with digital isolation. The teen appears tired and emotionally drained, symbolizing sleep lost to screen time. A moon is visible through the window, suggesting the ignored natural rhythm of night. Symmetrical composition, clean room, strong visual metaphor, quiet emotional realism, hyper-detailed, dramatic shadows, soft realism, magazine-cover quality, no text, no labels, no chart elements, not cartoonish.
author: Pagidimarri Sreenidhi
